name: Tyler Goodson
headline: Deep handcuff with no path to volume
body:
Goodson's profile screams emergency depth, not draftable asset. In 2025 he logged just 10 games on a 5% snap share, turning nine carries into 24 yards at 2.67 per rush with a brutal -0.327 EPA per play and only 3.2 fantasy points. Even his stronger 2024 line, 153 rushing yards on 4.78 a pop with a positive 0.085 EPA across 14 games, came with a 12.6% snap rate and a 3% target share, the ceiling of a clear backup.

The 2026 setup does nothing to change that math. He sits behind Jonathan Taylor with a role projected to stay minimal, an ECR around 456 overall and an RB rank near 119, and he is rostered in roughly zero leagues. A groin issue has trended the right way, but there is no realistic standalone value here. Goodson is purely a contingency stash, only relevant if the workhorse ahead of him misses extended time.
